title: phaseolus pluriflorus
intro: Phaseolus pluriflorus, also known as the many-flowered bean or multi-flowered kidney bean, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Asia. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus pluriflorus include its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, improve digestion, and aid in weight management. Herbal preparations of Phaseolus pluriflorus include infusions, decoctions, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
